---
  title: "Unit 1 For Live Session--t-Test"
  author: "Isabella"
  date: "1/21/2026"
  output:
  html_document: default
  word_document: default
---

# T-Test
##Find the test statistic
```{r}
ages = c(25, 19, 37, 29, 40, 28, 31)
n = 4
# sample the data
ages_test = ages[1:n]
mu = 21
test_mean = mean(ages_test)
test_sd = sd(ages_test)
# use the test statistic formula
t = (test_mean - mu)/(test_sd/sqrt(n))
t
```

##Collect the data and calculate
```{r}
mean(ages)
mean(ages)-mu
```
